prediction.reasoning: Based on ABT's historical volatility of approximately 20-25% annually and typical pharmaceutical sector dynamics, I estimated an 18-day standard deviation of about $2.45. The point estimate assumes no systematic drift over this short period. Confidence intervals are constructed using normal distribution assumptions with widening ranges to reflect increasing uncertainty at higher confidence levels.
